text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "Powershell spawned Rubeus.exe, a known credential access tool, to request a Kerberos Ticket Granting Ticket (TGT) using an NTLM hash and inject it into a new process. This is highly indicative of credential theft and Kerberos abuse.",
  "indicators": [
    "Rubeus.exe",
    "asktgt",
    "rc4",
    "createnetonly",
    "credential theft",
    "Kerberos abuse"
  ]
}
